commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=29849826daff64453ca61df262bfe0bdbfebbf1f)
commands.review_summary:
This PR updates the WinUI chat root/timeline so the assistant thinking placeholder renders as a chat bubble, tool progress can nest inside assistant/thinking bubbles, and Chat Exploration debug visibility/usage controls are isolated from production chat.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: a pre-assistant error ToolCall in an active turn enters the thinkingNestedTool path without BurstIsNestable, so it is nested and consumed instead of rendered externally. I did not run WinUI because this is a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human PR follow-up is needed because the contributor must add fuller real behavior proof and the branch needs a small code repair for failed pre-reply tool bursts.

target.title: Render thinking state inside assistant bubble
target.body: ## Summary - Render the assistant thinking placeholder inside an assistant chat bubble with secondary italic text - Nest tool-call progress inside the assistant/thinking bubble so the turn reads as one grouped response - Hide gateway usage metadata in production chat and isolate Chat Exploration debug controls from production visibility/layout - Keep production chat visuals stable while preserving Chat Exploration controls for the fake preview surface ## Validation - `./build.ps1` - `dotnet test ./tests/OpenClaw.Shared.Tests/OpenClaw.Shared.Tests.csproj --no-restore` — 1920 total, 0 failed, 29 skipped - `dotnet test ./tests/OpenClaw.Tray.Tests/OpenClaw.Tray.Tests.csproj --no-restore` — 1178 total, 0 failed - Windows XAML review: no blocking WinUI/XAML issues found
target.author: kenehong

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
